issue_summary: Bugzilla Fix for catPath not handling Windows-style path separators. Submitted by: Maarten Coene <Maarten.Coene.at.qmedit.com>
javadoc_before:
/** * Will concatenate 2 paths. Paths with .. will be * properly handled. *

Eg.,
* /a/b/c + d = /a/b/d
* /a/b/c + ../d = /a/d
*

* * Thieved from Tomcat sources... * * @return The concatenated paths, or null if error occurs */
javadoc_after:
/** * Will concatenate 2 paths. Paths with .. will be * properly handled. The path separator between the 2 paths is the * system default path separator. * *

Eg. on UNIX,
* /a/b/c + d = /a/b/d
* /a/b/c + ../d = /a/d
*

* *

Eg. on Microsoft Windows,
* C:\a\b\c + d = C:\a\b\d
* C:\a\b\c + ..\d = C:\a\d
* /a/b/c + d = /a/b\d
*

* * Thieved from Tomcat sources... * * @param lookupPath the base path to attach to * @param path path the second path to attach to the first * @return The concatenated paths, or null if error occurs */
